PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Paul McCalope (Petitioner).

The Court expressed concern about the time period when the funds go out of the blocked account into the new blocked account and stated that it was appropriate to have a Successor Administrator. Ms. fox stated that the only asset is the distribution of Josephine Wells' probate estate and that she did not have the amount. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
